JAVASCRIPT_ROADMAP.name: Phase 1: Fundamentals
JAVASCRIPT_ROADMAP.description: The foundation. Master these or everything else crumbles.

modules.name: Variables & Types
modules.description: Understanding how JavaScript stores and categorizes data.

topics.name: Variable Declarations
topics.description: var, let, and const - when to use each and why var is legacy.

topics.name: Primitive Types
topics.description: The building blocks of JavaScript data.
topics.code:
typeof "hello";     // "string"
typeof 42;          // "number"
typeof true;        // "boolean"
typeof undefined;   // "undefined"
typeof null;        // "object" (bug!)
typeof Symbol();    // "symbol"

topics.name: Reference Types
topics.description: Objects, arrays, and functions - stored by reference.

Conditional Statements

modules.name: Functions Basics
modules.description: The heart of JavaScript - reusable blocks of code.

Parameters & Arguments

call, apply, bind
